title: Cook Labs Industry Pack Manifest
description: Declarative definition of a vertical product. See spec 07-industry-pack-schema.md.

modules.description: Core modules this pack installs (must exist in the platform module registry).

entities.description: Module-owned entities added by this pack (map to module tables per spec 01 §5).

agents.description: Agent definitions shipped by this pack (each an agent-definition manifest).

workflows.description: Versioned workflow definitions installed by this pack.

integrations.description: Connector categories or specific connectors wired by this pack.

compliance_packs.description: Required Compliance Packs for regulated industries (spec 12 §7).
